context: Tests whether the agent detects a new ADR in the diff, reads the AGENTS.md table to find it maps to the ADR index, verifies the README.md index is consistent, adds the missing row for ADR 004, and checks whether any superseded ADR's status needs updating.

checklist.name: Git diff used
checklist.description: Evidence that git diff --staged (or equivalent) was run to detect docs/decisions/004-graphql-internal.md as the changed path

checklist.name: AGENTS.md table consulted
checklist.description: The agent read AGENTS.md and used its mapping to determine that docs/decisions/*.md changes require checking docs/decisions/README.md

checklist.name: ADR index row added
checklist.description: docs/decisions/README.md now contains a row for ADR 004 (title and status present)

checklist.name: ADR 004 row status correct
checklist.description: The new row in README.md shows ADR 004 as 'Accepted' (matching its own Status field)

checklist.name: Superseded ADR checked
checklist.description: The agent checked ADR 003's status line because ADR 004 references superseding it (even partially), and reported on whether it needed updating

checklist.name: No code files modified
checklist.description: Source code files were not edited — only docs/decisions/ files and the report

checklist.name: Report produced
checklist.description: A doc-sync-report.md file exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Report heading format
checklist.description: Report heading follows '## Doc sync — N paths changed' pattern

checklist.name: Report — generated artifacts section
checklist.description: Report contains a 'Generated artifacts' section covering ADR index result

checklist.name: Report — prose docs section
checklist.description: Report contains a 'Prose docs' section listing checked docs and their status

checklist.name: Unimplicated docs untouched
checklist.description: docs/architecture.md and other docs not mapped to docs/decisions/** changes were not edited
